card_description: A.N. Whitehead is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick uses Whitehead's and Leibniz's philosophy to argue that humans are "memory spools" or "perceiving cells" within the vast organism of God."
